# Rosalind Problem: Implement LeaderboardCyclopeptideSequencing

Here's a Visual Basic implementation of the LeaderboardCyclopeptideSequencing problem:

```vb
Module LeaderboardCyclopeptideSequencing
    ' Constants
    Private Const MASS_TOLERANCE As Integer = 1
    Private Const PEPTIDE_MASS As Integer = 113
    
    ' Global variables
    Private Dim aminoAcidMasses As Dictionary(Of String, Integer)
    Private Dim aminoAcidSymbols As List(Of String)
    
    Sub Main()
        ' Initialize amino acid masses
        InitializeAminoAcidMasses()

        Dim leaderboard As List(Of String) = New List(Of String) From {"LAST", "ALST", "TLLT", "TSSL"}
